subcodes.first_line: The path of God is more manifest than the sun, and His proof more conclusive than all that existeth in the realm of possibility. He is praised in His deeds and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبیل الهی اظهر از شمس و برهان احکم عما فی الامکان هو المحمود فی فعله و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @power of the Manifestation of God, @Hands of the Cause, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @transcendence; unknowability of God
